query:
ALTER TABLE invitations 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS candidate_application_id INT DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS contest_id INT DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS category ENUM('miss', 'mister', 'teen_miss', 'teen_mister') DEFAULT NULL;
